objective: High-fidelity code audit, security screening (OWASP/CWE), and architectural synthesis via multi-expert consensus.

tool_definition.name: llm_council_audit
tool_definition.description: Performs a 3-stage expert consensus audit on code or technical topics using Security, Architecture, and Vision specialists.

parameters.topic: The code string or technical topic to audit.

invocation_method.input_requirements: Topic string or complete source code blob.

expert_capabilities.Security: OWASP Top 10, CWE Mapping, Supply Chain vulnerability detection.
expert_capabilities.Technique: SOLID, Clean Architecture, Scalability bottlenecks, Technical Debt.
expert_capabilities.Vision: Market positioning, Leapfrog innovation, UX growth strategies.

integration_hints.handling_outputs: The CLI output is a Markdown report. Use regex to extract the 'Sentez Raporu' or 'Debug' sections if specific data parsing is needed.
integration_hints.ideal_context: Inject this JSON into your system prompt when you need to delegate complex decision-making to the council.
